title: Larcenciel Christmas Candle Holder, Black Gold Christmas Tea Light Holders Set of 3 - Reindeer, Wreaths, Xmas Tree Design, Romantic Glass Candle Holder for Xmas Table Centrepiece, Home Decoration
features: Exclusive Christmas Motifs: Drawing inspiration from Christmas trees, festive wreaths and reindeer, the christmas tealight holder distils the symbols of the season into tangible artistry, transforming a single flame into a vessel for conveying romance

Luxury Black Gold: Black gold lends Xmas an added touch of elegance and mystery. The t light holder, treated with a gilding process, features a black hue as deep as the night sky, while the gold shimmers like starlight, creating a uniquely luxurious aura

Light and Shadow Magician: As candlelight filters through the glass, shadows dance upon the walls—Christmas trees and Christmas wreaths cast their silhouettes, while reindeer prance with grace, transforming the space into a winter romance machine

Premium Materials: The christmas glass candle holder features thickened heat-resistant glass, offering excellent high-temperature tolerance and superior thermal insulation. Its edges are smoothly rounded to minimise the risk of scratches
Multiple Uses: Not just black gold candle holders, but also DIY scented candles, succulent planters, pen holders and other storage essentials. Ideal for home décor, festive gatherings and gifting
description: As the chimes of Christmas draw near, the neon lights at street corners and the warm glow of shop windows weave together into winter's most tender anticipation. This year, we present our “Black Gold Christmas Glass Candle Holders” as a festive offering, blending the classic symbols of Christmas with luxurious aesthetics, transforming a single candle flame into a vessel for conveying warmth and romance. Product Specifications: Material: Glass. Dimensions: 7.4×8cm Quantity: 3 pieces. Colour: Black and gold. Designs: Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, reindeer, etc. Notes: 1. Please refer to the measured values. Tiny measurement error is allowed within the normal range. 2. Due to the influence of monitor, camera or other factors, there may be a slight colour difference.
